heading: Obstruction of a lawful hunt
label: 5201 Obstruction of a lawful hunt
text: It is a violation of this section intentionally to engage in any physical conduct that significantly hinders a lawful hunt.
notes: Short Title, , , provided that:Pub. L. 103–322, title XXXII, § 320801108 Stat. 2121Sept. 13, 1994“This subtitle [subtitle H (§§ 320801–320808) of title XXXII of , enacting this chapter] may be cited as the ‘Recreational Hunting Safety and Preservation Act of 1994’.”Pub. L. 103–322
